approval.reason: First approved production baseline with reviewed accessibility limitations

known_limitation_snapshot.review_reason: Current FULL evidence and targeted replay both confirm an app-owned low-battery control with visible battery value but no accessible label or speech; raw FAIL remains preserved.
known_limitation_snapshot.title: Water Leak lowBattery control has no accessible name

known_limitation_snapshot.review_reason: Current FULL evidence and targeted replay both confirm the shared app-owned low-battery control has no accessible label or speech; raw FAIL remains preserved.
known_limitation_snapshot.title: Motion Sensor lowBattery control has no accessible name

known_limitation_snapshot.review_reason: Anchor recovery reaches a real information icon whose node has no accessible name; targeted replays confirm the same icon and raw FAIL remains preserved.
known_limitation_snapshot.title: Clothing Care information icon has no accessible name

known_limitation_snapshot.review_reason: The current row matches the historical Home Monitor toolbar settings-button signature; raw FAIL remains preserved as a reviewed known limitation.
known_limitation_snapshot.title: Home Monitor settings button has no accessible name

known_limitation_snapshot.review_reason: This raw FAIL is the repeated terminal observation of the same reviewed Clothing Care information icon; it remains preserved and is not a second app-defect issue.
known_limitation_snapshot.title: Clothing Care information icon repeated terminal row
